__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    createSettings:
      path: /settings
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        body: Settings
        content-type: application/json
      response:
        docs: Success
        type: Settings
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - request: {}
          response:
            body:
              provider:
                type: deepgram
                model: model
                language: language
                version: v1
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml
types:
  Settings:
    properties:
      provider: optional<ListenProvider>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ListenProviderV1Type:
    enum:
      - deepgram
    docs: Provider type
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ListenProviderV1:
    properties:
      type:
        type: ListenProviderV1Type
        docs: Provider type
      model:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: Model name
      language:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: Language code
        default: en-US
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
    inline: true
  ListenProviderV2Type:
    enum:
      - deepgram
    docs: Provider type
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ListenProviderV2:
    properties:
      type:
        type: ListenProviderV2Type
        docs: Provider type
      model:
        type: string
        docs: Model name
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
    inline: true
  ListenProvider:
    discriminant:
      value: version
      context: data
    base-properties: {}
    union:
      v1: ListenProviderV1
      v2: ListenProviderV2
    default-variant: v1
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Discriminant Default Value
